data.title: New OtterBox Unbreakable Love Collection combines romance and resilience with playful designs for Valentine's Day 2026.
data.description: In Fort Collins, Colorado, a new OtterBox Symmetry Series Unbreakable Love Collection is set to launch this Valentine's Day on January 21, 2026. The collection includes designs with playful polka dots, elegant florals, and flirty elements like lipstick, bows, and lock-and-key motifs. This collection aims to combine romance with resilience and is expected to resonate with consumers looking for both style and durability in their phone accessories.

data.title: Pennsylvania housing market cools in December, with median sales price falling 5% to $289,000.
data.description: In Lemoyne, Pennsylvania on January 21, 2026, a housing report for the Pennsylvania Association of Realtors® revealed a significant cooling in the state's housing market similar to the drop in temperatures seen in December. The median sales price for homes decreased by approximately 5% from the previous month, now standing at $289,000.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) to report Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Feb 19, 2026, with a conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at around 7:00 a.m. ET. Following the release, there will be a conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day to further discuss the financial performance. To join the conference call, participants can dial 1-833-821-5374 for domestic calls or 1-412-652-1260 for international calls. Additionally, a link for the call will be activated 15 minutes prior to the start time.

data.title: Exowatt launches ExoRise to offer turnkey land and energy solutions for AI with P3 technology.
data.description: Miami-based company Exowatt revealed the introduction of ExoRise, a division focused on providing powered land and energy infrastructure specifically for hyperscale data centers. This new venture integrates land, power, and Exowatt’s innovative P3 technology, which is capable of storing energy as heat and transforming it into electricity as needed, ensuring a consistent power supply around the clock. In response to the rapidly increasing power needs of artificial intelligence applications, ExoRise presents customers with a comprehensive, ready-to-use solution.

data.title: Chatham Lodging Trust to hold Q4 2025 earnings call on Feb 25, 2026, in West Palm Beach, Fla.
data.description: Chatham Lodging Trust has disclosed that their fourth-quarter 2025 earnings call is scheduled to take place on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, in West Palm Beach, Florida. The announcement was made through a press release. This indicates that stakeholders and interested parties can tune in to listen to the updates and financial results for the mentioned period. It is a significant event for the company in terms of sharing vital information and insights with investors and the public. Such calls are common practices for companies to report their financial performance and discuss future projections.

data.title: First American Title offers free property title monitoring & fraud alert service to customers amid $13.7B cyber losses in 2024.
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, First American Title Insurance Company, a prominent title insurance and settlement services provider and the primary subsidiary of First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), disclosed the introduction of a complimentary property title monitoring and fraud alert service for its clients. This service is crucial in safeguarding homeowners in light of increasing real estate fraud threats. The announcement comes as cyber-enabled losses surpassed $13.7 billion in 2024.

data.title: Engineering Resource Group receives strategic investment from Godspeed Capital Management LP. Transaction terms undisclosed.
data.description: A mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) engineering firm, Engineering Resource Group, Inc. (ERG) based in Flowood, Mississippi, has revealed a recent strategic investment from Godspeed Capital Management LP. This investment, targeting the lower middle-market Defense & Government services sector, is set to strengthen ERG's position in the industry. However, specific financial details of the transaction have not been disclosed at this time. Godspeed aims to collaborate closely with ERG to enhance its operations and growth prospects moving forward.

data.title: Cooler Master introduces Dyn-X Racing Simulators at Rolex 24 at Daytona, featured in Honda Racing Corporation booth.
data.description: Cooler Master debuted their Dyn-X sim racing technology at the Rolex 24 in Daytona within the Honda Racing Corporation booth in Los Angeles.

data.title: SC to hear arguments on President Trump's attempt to remove Fed Governor Lisa Cook after deferring the decision. Hearing set for Wednesday.
data.description: The decision on the president’s attempts to remove Cook was postponed by the justices, who scheduled a hearing for Wednesday to discuss the matter.

data.title: Food and Beverage industry adopts Samsara for efficient deliveries. Major players join, NYSE: IOT. Platform offers real-time insights.
data.description: Samsara Inc. (NYSE: IOT), based in San Francisco, recently revealed that the Food and Beverage (F&B) sector is increasingly adopting their Connected Operations® Platform. This includes major producers and distributors, as well as smaller grocery stores. Samsara supports F&B businesses in enhancing their operations by offering real-time data insights and enhancing customer service quality. The company's adaptability and commitment to collaboration distinguishes it as a top choice for industry leaders.

data.title: Justin Golden appointed CEO of Stephen Gould, largest US supply chain solutions provider. 3rd gen leader; father Michael as advisor & chairman.
data.description: In Madison, New Jersey, Stephen Gould, the leading independent supply chain solutions provider in the US, has named Justin Golden as the new Chief Executive Officer. Justin, the third-generation family member to lead at Stephen Gould, takes on the position immediately. This move signals a fresh phase in the company's development and future strategic plans. Justin takes over from his father, Michael Golden, who will now assume the roles of Strategic Advisor and Chairman of the company.

data.title: Beast Health introduces Blended in Steel™ Collection with double-walled stainless steel option keeping blends cold for 12 hours.
data.description: Beast Health®, a leading company in innovative personal blending, unveiled its latest product line, the Blended in Steel™ Collection, in Los Angeles today. This collection introduces a new stainless steel model designed to cater to individual blending needs and capable of maintaining blended concoctions at low temperatures for a remarkable 12 hours. The company's priority has always been to offer a top-tier blending encounter by utilizing superior materials, such as the ultra-thick stainless steel incorporated into this new product.

data.title: TouchTunes appoints Angela Abbott as VP of Music Licensing & Strategy to oversee music strategy, licensing, operations. She will lead music team, manage relationships with key stakeholders. Report to GC Amy Tenbrink.
data.description: TouchTunes has named Angela Abbott as the new Vice President of Music Licensing and Strategy in New York. Reporting to General Counsel Amy Tenbrink, Abbott will be responsible for managing the company’s music strategy, licensing, and operations. Her role will involve leading the music team, handling relationships with record labels, publishers, and performing rights organizations. She will collaborate with various departments including product, sales, marketing, and engineering. Abbott's appointment signifies a strategic move by TouchTunes to strengthen its music operations and boost partnerships within the industry.

data.title: 25th anniversary of SOBEWFF celebrated in Miami with celebrity hosts, major music acts, and new events from Feb 19-22, 2026.
data.description: South Beach Wine & Food Festival (SOBEWFF) marks its 25th anniversary from February 19 to 22, 2026, in Miami. The event will showcase new activities, renowned celebrity hosts, and significant music performances throughout the city.

data.title: Manitowoc Co. appoints Mark B. Rourke & Randy A. Wood as new directors on board; Rourke is CEO of Schneider National.
data.description: In Milwaukee, The Manitowoc Company, Inc. (NYSE: MTW) revealed the appointment of Mark B. Rourke and Randy A. Wood to its board of directors. Mark Rourke, President and CEO of Schneider National (NYSE: SNDR), a prominent transportation firm in North America, joins the board effective immediately. Rourke has been with Schneider since 1987. The Manitowoc Company is known for manufacturing cranes and lifting solutions on a global scale.

data.title: ATX Networks receives UL1973 certification for Areca™ Hybrid Supercapacitors, providing safe backup power for telecom/data centers.
data.description: ATX Networks has recently revealed that their Areca™ Hybrid Supercapacitors have obtained UL1973 certification. This certification confirms that the supercapacitors are able to provide secure and durable backup power for telecom and data centers, guaranteeing a prolonged lifespan.

data.title: Aurora to host Q4 2025 business review conference call on Feb 11, 2026 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time. $AUR. Webcast available.
data.description: A leading company in autonomous technology, Aurora Innovation, Inc. (NASDAQ: AUR), based in Pittsburgh, disclosed its plans to unveil its Q4 2025 financial outcomes post-market closing on February 11, 2026. Additionally, the firm will conduct a business review phone call at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. The call will be streamed live on Aurora's investor relations site at ir.aurora.tech, with a 30-day replay of the webcast accessible thereafter. Aurora (Nasdaq: AUR) is dedicated to providing the advantages of self-driving technology.
